nasb.text: As for the house which King Solomon built for the Lord, its length was sixty cubits and its width twenty cubits and its height thirty cubits.

esv.text: The house that King Solomon built for the Lord was sixty cubits long, twenty cubits wide, and thirty cubits high.

cnv.text: 所羅門為耶和華所建的殿，長二十七公尺，寬九公尺，高十三公尺半。

ccb.text: 所罗门王为耶和华建造的殿长二十七米，宽九米，高十三米半。
